Author: Sucy
Name: LastFmHonorific
Punchline: Your Last.fm now-playing track as an honorific
Description: Update honorific title based on your currently playing Last.fm track (works with anything that scrobbles, e.g. YouTube Music, Spotify, foobar2000). Adapted from SpotifyHonorific by Valiice (AGPL-3.0).
